mapper.select: /* SQL ID : QbnkQstnDAO.profQbnkQstnList 설 명 : 교수문항복사문제은행문항목록조회 */ WITH QBNK_CTGR AS ( SELECT NVL(CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID, CTGR.QBNK_CTGR_ID) AS UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID , (SELECT CTGRNM FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR WHERE QBNK_CTGR_ID = NVL(CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID, CTGR.QBNK_CTGR_ID)) AS UP_QBNK_CTGRNM , CASE WHEN CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CTGR.QBNK_CTGR_ID END AS QBNK_CTGR_ID , CASE WHEN CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID IS NULL THEN '-' ELSE CTGR.CTGRNM END AS QBNK_CTGRNM FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR CTGR WHERE CTGR.DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY CTGR.CTGR_SEQNO ) SELECT QBNK_QSTN.QBNK_QSTN_ID AS QSTN_ID , (SELECT UP_QBNK_CTGRNM FROM QBNK_CTGR WHERE UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID = QBNK_QSTN.QBNK_CTGR_ID) AS UP_QBNK_CTGRNM , (SELECT QBNK_CTGRNM FROM QBNK_CTGR WHERE QBNK_CTGR_ID = QBNK_QSTN.QBNK_CTGR_ID) AS QBNK_CTGRNM , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD' AND CD = QBNK_QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD) AS QSTN_RSPNS_TYNM , QBNK_QSTN.QSTN_TTL , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_DFCTLV_TYCD' AND CD = QBNK_QSTN.QSTN_DFCTLV_TYCD) AS QSTN_DFCTLV_TYNM FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN QBNK_QSTN WHERE QBNK_QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND QBNK_QSTN.QBNK_CTGR_ID = #{qbnkCtgrId} ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC

/* SQL ID : QbnkQstnDAO.qbnkQstnSelect 설 명 : 문제은행문항조회 */ SELECT QSTN.QBNK_QSTN_ID , QSTN.QBNK_CTGR_ID , (SELECT QBNK_CTGR_ID FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR WHERE QBNK_CTGR_ID = CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_TTL , DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(QSTN.QSTN_CTS, 4000, 1) AS QSTN_CTS , QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD , QSTN.CRANS_TYCD , QSTN.QSTN_DFCTLV_TYCD , CTGR.CTGRNM , (SELECT CTGRNM FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR WHERE QBNK_CTGR_ID = CTGR.UP_QBNK_CTGR_ID) AS UP_CTGRNM , SBJCT.SBJCTNM , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_RPRS_ID = CTGR.USER_RPRS_ID) AS USERNM FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN QSTN JOIN TB_LMS_QBNK_CTGR CTGR ON QSTN.QBNK_CTGR_ID = CTGR.QBNK_CTGR_ID AND CTGR.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = CTGR.SBJCT_ID AND SBJCT.DELYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN.QBNK_QSTN_ID = #{qbnkQstnId}
/* SQL ID : QbnkQstnDAO.qbnkNextQstnSeqnoSelect 설 명 : 문제은행다음문항순번조회 */ SELECT NVL(MAX(QSTN_SEQNO), 0) + 1 FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN WHERE QBNK_CTGR_ID = #{qbnkCtgrId} AND DELYN = 'N'
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : QbnkQstnDAO.qbnkQstnDelNSeqnoModify 설 명 : 문제은행문항미삭제순번수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN QBNK_QSTN SET QBNK_QSTN.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , QBNK_QSTN.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , QBNK_QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO = QBNK_QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO - 1 WHERE QBNK_QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT QBNK_CTGR_ID, QSTN_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_QBNK_QSTN WHERE QBNK_QSTN_ID = #{qbnkQstnId} ) BASE WHERE QBNK_QSTN.QBNK_CTGR_ID = BASE.QBNK_CTGR_ID AND QBNK_QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO > BASE.QSTN_SEQNO )
